findings.summary: valid JSON arrays with non-string elements were String()-coerced, silently storing '[object Object]' / 'null' tags — the exact class the fix forswears; now rejected loudly ('must contain only strings'), verified live over the MCP wire and by isolated revert (exactly its own test goes red)

a legit tag starting with '[' is unwritable/unsearchable via MCP (JSON-array detection claims the prefix) — accepted: zero occurrences in the 246-entry brain, the error is loud and immediate, the CLI face still handles such tags, and the limitation is now documented in both tags param descriptions (verified rendering in tools/list)
the shared helper's error always said 'tags' even when the failing param was contradicts — now labelled per call site, verified live in both throw paths

search-boundary micro-changes: kb_search tags='[]' was a filter on the literal tag '[]' and is now a no-op filter; whitespace-only input now yields undefined — practically unreachable inputs, accepted as noted

ruledOut: root-cause misattribution: the issue's cited bundle line (~L31158 array(string()).catch([])) is validate.ts's READ-boundary schema inlined — ADR-0042 §2 explicitly blesses lenient reads with safe defaults; the real input-side defects were the CSV mangle of JSON-array-shaped strings and kb_supersede's SDK-stripped unknown tags key

proof-cannot-fail: both round-1 hunks reverted in isolation with rebuilds — each turns exactly its own tests red (2 and 1 respectively) and nothing else; round-2 every-string check likewise (1 test red, 17 green); restored and re-verified 294/294
quiet-success in the loud path: garbage rejection tests assert isError PLUS message content PLUS nothing-stored (search no-match) — exit-flag-only predicates avoided per ADR-0051 §3

edge inputs probed live over the real MCP wire: whitespace-only, '[]', '[1,2]' (now loud), '[null]' (now loud), object elements (now loud), nested arrays (now loud), '{"a":1}' (pre-existing CSV path unchanged), 500-tag CSV, whitespace string elements (trim+filter matches CSV semantics); server stays alive after every error probe
call-site audit: all four tags() consumers (kb_search tags, kb_add tags, kb_add contradicts, kb_supersede tags) reviewed; kb_supersede's new param is itself hardened
scope/protocols: two commits touch only src/mcp-server.ts + test/mcp.test.ts; no AI attribution; no secrets; test style matches the file's existing idioms
